description:
Hi, Friends!🌞
My name is Andreea! I’m a certified fitness trainer and full time YouTuber with a lifelong passion for fitness. I create low impact, all standing workouts that are easy on the joints but still deliver great results. On this channel, you'll find over 1,300 standing workout videos (about half of them knee friendly), using just your bodyweight or minimal equipment (dumbbells/kettlebells). I keep things fun, varied, and repeat-free to help you stay consistent. I also run a second channel, BurpeeGirl Short Workouts, with 15-20 min workouts for busy days. Whether you're just starting or looking for sustainable routines, I’ve got you covered!❤️💪💦

description:
Welcome to my channel!

This is the home of my podcast, Working Hard, Hardly Working, plus snippets of my life as an entrepreneur. 

I started this podcast as my own personal school of life. I’m fascinated by the many ways that we define success and how people who have 'achieved it' stay at the top. What are their daily non-negotiables? How do they keep balance? What do they regret?

From housing campaigners to investors and sex experts, no avenue is off limits. I want you to leave every conversation with a new perspective on working hard and some actionable advice too.

So, get ready to take notes, here’s what you need to know to build the life you dream of.

description:
Elderfit has one mission — to help people over 60 transform their lives by improving strength, balance, mobility, and independence through exercise.

Founded by Tom and Gareth, Elderfit has been supporting older adults for over 10 years, delivering live classes and coaching that have helped thousands become stronger, more confident, and more active.

How We Help

We support the over-60s community in four key ways:

1, Free online fitness routines and education via Youtube
2, Personalised coaching and tailored exercise programs worldwide for less than £1 a day via elderfittv.com (also available through the Elderfit TV app)
3, Free tips, guidance, and exercise help through our newsletter
4, Live in-person classes across Wales, UK

Enjoy the free content. To get started on the exercise programs and coaching use the links below.

description:
AIM Fitness is dedicated to offering specialized fitness programs for older adults aged 50 and up. We provide In-Home Personal Training services in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada, along with Virtual Fitness options globally, Seniors Health and Wellness Education, and Fall Prevention Webinars. Our online fitness membership program, AIM Fitness Online, is a complete fitness program that you can do at home with access to 20-30 minute exercise videos to help improve your strength and balance.

Follow us for engaging videos focused on senior's health and fitness, empowering you to live life to the fullest with increased strength, mobility, and energy! We specialize in fitness solutions for individuals with Osteoporosis, helping them prevent falls and enhance their balance.

description:
Home of Tony Ruggiero (Golf Digest Top 50 Instructor) and our handpicked team of coaches delivering real golf instruction with real golfers who want to play better.

On this channel you’ll find live golf lessons, practice sessions, and step-by-step golf swing drills that help you hit longer drives, improve ball striking, fix your slice or hook, compress your irons, sharpen your short game, and lower your scores. We break down the golf swing in a simple, repeatable way with training plans, exercises, & on-course tips you can use on the range & course.

You’ll see what actually works because we teach everyday golfers in real time, not models. Expect swing analysis, setup and grip fixes, backswing and downswing sequencing, rotation and pressure drills, plus actionable guidance for drivers, irons, wedges, chipping, pitching, and putting.

We also run giveaways during our Pro Work Series around each Major Championship.
Subscribe, watch, and comment for a chance to win clubs, gear, and more.

My name is Shelby, and I’ve been a flexibility trainer since 2012. As a former Rhythmic Gymnast on the U.S. National Team, I know firsthand that real flexibility requires more than just stretching. It takes strength, control, consistency, and smart training.

Through FlexAbilities, my online flexibility training platform, I help dancers, figure skaters, gymnasts, and other athletes improve safely and effectively. Members get access to weekly stretch plans, progressive routines, and a growing library of 300+ videos designed to build flexibility with purpose.

Learn more at www.flex-abilities.com
